DubbingProject.title: Dubbing Project
DubbingProject.description: A project representing a video dubbing and lip-sync task.

userId.description: The UID of the user who created the project.

sourceVideoUrl.description: URL of the original source video.

status.description: Current status of the dubbing pipeline.

metadata.description: Neural analysis metadata (source text, translation, emotion, etc.)

dubbedAudioUrl.description: URL of the generated dubbed audio.

dubbedVideoUrl.description: URL of the final lip-synced video.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.
